title: CCTV Camera
description: Changes the Carved Pumpkin to a 3D Model of a CCTV Security Camera when named "CCTV Cam" in an anvil.
body:
![To remodel an item, rename a carved pumpkin in an anvil to CCTV Cam](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cd57803cfe9cd6a4df0d084b84fe4d0b75bc1fb8.png)This resource pack replaces the Carved Pumpkin with 3D model of CCTV Security Camera, available through renaming.

**Required mods**
- [Optifine](https://www.optifine.net/home): Required for custom item textures and emissive textures.
- [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn/versions): Required for custom item textures when using fabric.
